COURT WILL DETERMINE THE FAIR COMPENSTION FOR DEFTS' HOLD OVER STAY. DEFTS MAY MOVE ALL ARTS THAT ARE CONSIGNED, ARTS NOT IDENTIFIED AS CONSIGNED CANNOT BE REMOVED. DEFT TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A LIST OF GALLARY ART THAT WERE NOT CONSIGNED. PLAINTIFFS MAY VISIT GALLERY WITH COUNSEL, MAY INSPECT, TAKE PHOTOGRAPHS BUT MAY NOT REMOVE ANY ITEM.
